SEARCH
Package org.key_project.util.bean

Interface IBean

All Known Implementing Classes:
Bean
public interface IBean

Defines the methods that a Java bean must have.

Implementation of this interface should subclass from Bean if possible.

See Also:
  • Bean

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addPropertyChangeListener(PropertyChangeListener listener)
    Adds the given listener.
    void
    addPropertyChangeListener(String propertyName, PropertyChangeListener listener)
    Adds the given listener for the given property only.
    PropertyChangeListener[]
    getPropertyChangeListeners()
    Returns all listeners.
    PropertyChangeListener[]

    Returns all listeners of the given property.

    Checks if the given listener is already available.
    boolean
    hasListener(String propertyName, PropertyChangeListener listener)
    Checks if the given listener is available for the given property.

    Checks if listeners are available.
    boolean

    Checks if listeners are available for the given property.

    Removes the given listener.
    void

    Removes the given listener from the given property.

  • Method Details

    • addPropertyChangeListener

      void addPropertyChangeListener(PropertyChangeListener listener)
      Adds the given listener.
      Parameters:
      listener - The listener to add.

    • addPropertyChangeListener

      void addPropertyChangeListener(String propertyName, PropertyChangeListener listener)
      Adds the given listener for the given property only.
      Parameters:
      propertyName - The property to observe.
      listener - The listener to add.

    • removePropertyChangeListener

      void removePropertyChangeListener(PropertyChangeListener listener)
      Removes the given listener.
      Parameters:
      listener - The listener to remove.

    • removePropertyChangeListener

      void removePropertyChangeListener(String propertyName, PropertyChangeListener listener)
      Removes the given listener from the given property.
      Parameters:
      propertyName - The property to no longer observe.
      listener - The listener to remove.

    • getPropertyChangeListeners

      PropertyChangeListener[] getPropertyChangeListeners()
      Returns all listeners.
      Returns:
      The listeners.

    • getPropertyChangeListeners

      PropertyChangeListener[] getPropertyChangeListeners(String propertyName)
      Returns all listeners of the given property.
      Parameters:
      propertyName - The property.
      Returns:
      The listeners of the given property.

    • hasListeners

      boolean hasListeners()
      Checks if listeners are available.
      Returns:
      true listeners available, false no listeners are available.

    • hasListeners

      boolean hasListeners(String propertyName)
      Checks if listeners are available for the given property.
      Parameters:
      propertyName - The property name.
      Returns:
      true listeners available for the property, false no listeners are available for the property.

    • hasListener

      boolean hasListener(PropertyChangeListener listener)
      Checks if the given listener is already available.
      Parameters:
      listener - The listener to check.
      Returns:
      true listener is available, false listener is not available.

    • hasListener

      boolean hasListener(String propertyName, PropertyChangeListener listener)
      Checks if the given listener is available for the given property.
      Parameters:
      propertyName - The property.
      listener - The listener to check.
      Returns:
      true listener is available for the property, false listener is not available for the property.
